page.title: AI Integrations
page.description: Connect your personal provider accounts once, then configure each connection and choose where Storyarn may offer it. Providers bill your account directly.

connected.title: Connected providers
connected.description: Open a provider to manage its key, Storyarn-supported models, and workspace access.

available.title: Available providers
available.description: Choose a provider to review Storyarn-supported models and connect your personal API key.

team.title: My AI Team
team.description: Choose the primary provider and model for each role in each workspace. The same provider key can power different configurations across your workspaces.

overview.title: My AI Team
overview.description: Review your personal provider and model choices across every workspace you can access.
overview.personal_scope_note: This overview only shows your own AI connections and role choices. Other members keep their provider keys and configurations private.
overview.membership_required: Workspace membership is required to configure this AI team.
overview.configured_hint: Saved now; execution support is still being built.

empty.title: No workspaces to show
empty.description: Once you join or create a workspace, its personal AI team configuration will appear here.

configuration.title: Configure {workspace}
configuration.description: Choose the personal provider and primary model used by each supported role in this workspace.

workspace.title: Workspace configuration
workspace.description: Each workspace keeps its own role and model choices.

team.workspace_scope_note: These choices apply only to this workspace. Your API keys remain personal account connections and can be reused in other workspaces with different models.

policy_blocked.title: Personal AI is disabled in this workspace
policy_blocked.description: The workspace owner must allow member personal AI before these roles can be configured. Existing choices remain visible for repair and are never used while blocked.

roles_section.title: Roles
roles_section.description: Set one primary model for each kind of explicitly requested work. If Storyarn AI reaches its limit, a personal model is only offered as an explicit continuation; it is never used automatically.

general_assistant.title: General assistant
general_assistant.description: Summaries and general structured tasks launched from the command palette and other supported surfaces.

writing_assistant.title: Writing assistant
writing_assistant.description: Drafting, rewriting, and narrative text suggestions.

illustrator.title: Illustrator
illustrator.description: Image-generation tasks once a compatible personal adapter is available.

voice.title: Voice
voice.description: Scratch voice-over tasks once speech support is available.

repairs.workspace_policy_denied: The workspace policy currently blocks this personal preference.
repairs.provider_disconnected: Reconnect this provider or choose another eligible connection.
repairs.assignment_required: Enable this connection for the workspace before using it here.
repairs.model_unavailable: Your key can no longer access this model. Choose an available model.
repairs.model_deprecated: This model can no longer be selected. Choose a supported replacement.
repairs.capability_mismatch: This model no longer supports everything required by this role.

team.selection_help: Select an eligible provider and its primary model.
team.no_compatible_options: No connection with a supported model is enabled for this workspace and role yet.

configuration_only.option_description: You can save this model now, but Storyarn cannot execute this role yet. No request is sent and no provider charge occurs.
configuration_only.saved_description: Configuration saved. Storyarn cannot execute this role yet, so no request is sent and no provider charge occurs.

team.personal_billing: {provider} · your key. The provider bills your account directly.
team.no_roles: No configurable AI roles are available yet.

empty.description: No AI providers are available yet.

detail.description: Manage your personal {name} connection. Workspace access and role choices remain separate.
detail.key_replaced: The new key was validated before replacing the previous one.

connection.title: Connection
connection.not_connected_description: Storyarn validates the key before saving it. The key belongs to your account and is never shared with a workspace.

models.title: Models supported by Storyarn
models.description: Storyarn's reviewed catalog for this provider. Final availability also depends on your API key. Choose each workspace role's primary model in My AI Team.
models.empty: Storyarn does not currently support a model for this provider, so this connection cannot be assigned to a role.
models.configuration_only_description: This model can be selected for future roles, but Storyarn cannot execute it yet. No request is sent and no provider charge occurs.

impacts.title: Roles using this connection
impacts.description: See exactly which workspace roles depend on this provider. Items needing attention appear first.

disconnect.title: Disconnect provider
disconnect.description: This removes the stored key and disables every workspace and role that depends on this connection.

assignments.title: Workspace access
assignments.description: Choose the workspaces where Storyarn may offer this personal connection. Enabled workspaces appear first.
assignments.consent_note: Enabling a workspace does not run AI automatically. Storyarn still asks for explicit consent before sending project content to this provider.
assignments.no_workspaces: You do not currently have an eligible workspace for this connection.

reasons.member_policy_allowed: The workspace owner allows personal AI keys
reasons.member_policy_disabled: The workspace owner has disabled personal AI keys

connect.title: Connect {name}
connect.description: Paste your API key. Storyarn encrypts it at rest and validates it before saving.
connect.label: API key

replace.title: Replace {name} key
replace.description: The existing key remains active unless the replacement passes provider validation.

disconnect.title: Disconnect {name}?
disconnect.description: This removes your stored API key for {name}, its workspace access, and role configurations that depend on it. You can reconnect anytime.

errors.invalid_key: This API key was rejected by the provider. Double-check it and try again.
errors.network_error: Could not reach the provider. Check your connection and try again.
errors.provider_error: The provider returned an error. Please try again in a moment.
errors.rate_limited: Too many attempts. Wait a minute and try again.
errors.unauthorized: Your recent authorization expired. Confirm your password and try again.
errors.integration_changed: This connection changed in another session. Refresh and try again.
errors.feature_disabled: AI integrations are not available right now.
errors.integration_unavailable: This integration is not available to your account.
errors.workspace_unavailable: This workspace is not available to your account.
errors.workspace_policy_disabled: The workspace owner has disabled personal AI keys.
errors.provider_already_assigned: Another personal connection for this provider is already enabled in this workspace.
errors.assignment_not_found: This workspace assignment no longer exists.
errors.assignment_required: Enable this provider for the workspace before assigning it to a role.
errors.model_unavailable: This model is not available to your provider account.
errors.model_deprecated: This model is deprecated and cannot be selected.
errors.capability_mismatch: This model is not compatible with that role.
errors.invalid_preference_slot: This AI role cannot be configured yet.
errors.connection_lost: Lost connection to the server. Please retry.
errors.unknown_error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
